normalization.notes: Modern Russian Cyrillic is stored in NFC. Optional stress marks are pronunciation metadata and should not replace canonical spellings.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Cyrillic letters, uppercase/lowercase variants, soft and hard signs, and selected sound-family rules
segmentation.notes: Russian text is whitespace-delimited. Teach soft and hard signs as orthographic modifiers and preserve stress marks as optional pronunciation aids.
